Fivey Can Read OpenClaw 绘本版文档站 · 气球故事书主题

Tools 故事分馆

Slash Commands，像讲故事一样读

这一页像一本关于“Slash 魔法口令s”的小绘本，它先告诉我们这位机器人朋友会做什么，再一步一步解释什么时候该这样做。 你可以先把它想成：Slash 魔法口令s。

气球故事书主题 逐节讲解 代码也讲故事 SEO 友好 Cloudflare Pages

先听总故事

Slash Commands

这一页像一本关于“Slash 魔法口令s”的小绘本，它先告诉我们这位机器人朋友会做什么，再一步一步解释什么时候该这样做。 你可以先把它想成：Slash 魔法口令s。

原始路径：/tools/slash-commands 章节数量：12 查看原文

第 1 站

Start Here

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Start Here”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Slash 魔法口令s”。

原文小纸条

# Slash commands

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“魔法口令s are handled by the 门口的小门卫. Most 魔法口令s must be sent as a **standalone** 小纸条消息 that starts with /. The host-only ba…”。

原文小纸条

Commands are handled by the Gateway. Most commands must be sent as a **standalone** message that starts with /. The host-only bash chat command uses ! <cmd> (with /bash <cmd> as an alias).

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“There are two related systems:”。

原文小纸条

There are two related systems:

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“allowlist used; otherwise authorization comes from 消息通道 allowlists/pairing plus 魔法口令s.useAccess大家一起的房间s. Unauthorized s…”。

原文小纸条

allowlist used; otherwise authorization comes from channel allowlists/pairing plus commands.useAccessGroups. Unauthorized senders see directives treated as plain text.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Start Here”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：**魔法口令s**: standalone /... 小纸条消息s.、**Directives**: /think, /fast, /verbose,…、Directives are stripped from the 小纸条消息 be…、In normal chat 小纸条消息s (not directive-only…。

原文小纸条
  • **Commands**: standalone /... messages.
  • **Directives**: /think, /fast, /verbose, /reasoning, /elevated, /exec, /model, /queue.
  • Directives are stripped from the message before the model sees it.
  • In normal chat messages (not directive-only), they are treated as “inline hints” and do **not** persist session settings.
  • In directive-only messages (the message contains only directives), they persist to the session and reply with an acknowledgement.
  • Directives are only applied for **authorized senders**. If commands.allowFrom is set, it is the only
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“There are also a few **inline shortcuts** (allowlisted/authorized senders only): /help, /魔法口令s, /status, /whoami (/id).…”。

原文小纸条

There are also a few **inline shortcuts** (allowlisted/authorized senders only): /help, /commands, /status, /whoami (/id). They run immediately, are stripped before the model sees the message, and the remaining text continues through the normal flow.

第 2 站

设置说明书

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“设置说明书”。

像魔法口令拆解

这段不是故事对白，而是设置卡片，像在给机器人贴名字、地址和规则标签。

  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
  • 这里在给“commands”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“{”。
  • 这里在给“native”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“auto”。
原文代码块
{
  commands: {
    native: "auto",
    nativeSkills: "auto",
    text: true,
    bash: false,
    bashForegroundMs: 2000,
    config: false,
    mcp: false,
    plugins: false,
    debug: false,
    restart: false,
    allowFrom: {
      "*": ["user1"],
      discord: ["user:123"],
    },
    useAccessGroups: true,
  },
}
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“only authorization source for 魔法口令s and directives (消息通道 allowlists/pairing and 魔法口令s.useAccess大家一起的房间s are ignored). U…”。

原文小纸条

only authorization source for commands and directives (channel allowlists/pairing and commands.useAccessGroups are ignored). Use "*" for a global default; provider-specific keys override it.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Config”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：魔法口令s.text (default true) enables parsing…、On surfaces without native 魔法口令s (WhatsAp…、魔法口令s.native (default "auto") registers n…、Auto: on for Discord/Telegram; off for Sl…。

原文小纸条
  • commands.text (default true) enables parsing /... in chat messages.
  • On surfaces without native commands (WhatsApp/WebChat/Signal/iMessage/Google Chat/Microsoft Teams), text commands still work even if you set this to false.
  • commands.native (default "auto") registers native commands.
  • Auto: on for Discord/Telegram; off for Slack (until you add slash commands); ignored for providers without native support.
  • Set channels.discord.commands.native, channels.telegram.commands.native, or channels.slack.commands.native to override per provider (bool or "auto").
  • false clears previously registered commands on Discord/Telegram at startup. Slack commands are managed in the Slack app and are not removed automatically.
  • commands.nativeSkills (default "auto") registers **skill** commands natively when supported.
  • Auto: on for Discord/Telegram; off for Slack (Slack requires creating a slash command per skill).
  • Set channels.discord.commands.nativeSkills, channels.telegram.commands.nativeSkills, or channels.slack.commands.nativeSkills to override per provider (bool or "auto").
  • commands.bash (default false) enables ! <cmd> to run host shell commands (/bash <cmd> is an alias; requires tools.elevated allowlists).
  • commands.bashForegroundMs (default 2000) controls how long bash waits before switching to background mode (0 backgrounds immediately).
  • commands.config (default false) enables /config (reads/writes openclaw.json).
  • commands.mcp (default false) enables /mcp (reads/writes OpenClaw-managed MCP config under mcp.servers).
  • commands.plugins (default false) enables /plugins (plugin discovery/status plus install + enable/disable controls).
  • commands.debug (default false) enables /debug (runtime-only overrides).
  • commands.allowFrom (optional) sets a per-provider allowlist for command authorization. When configured, it is the
  • commands.useAccessGroups (default true) enforces allowlists/policies for commands when commands.allowFrom is not set.

第 3 站

魔法口令 list

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“魔法口令 list”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Text + native (when enabled):”。

原文小纸条

Text + native (when enabled):

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Command list”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/help、/魔法口令s、/工具小帮手s [compact verbose] (show what the…、/skill <name> [input] (run a skill by nam…。

原文小纸条
  • /help
  • /commands
  • /tools [compact|verbose] (show what the current agent can use right now; verbose adds descriptions)
  • /skill <name> [input] (run a skill by name)
  • /status (show current status; includes provider usage/quota for the current model provider when available)
  • /allowlist (list/add/remove allowlist entries)
  • /approve <id> allow-once|allow-always|deny (resolve exec approval prompts)
  • /context [list|detail|json] (explain “context”; detail shows per-file + per-tool + per-skill + system prompt size)
  • /btw <question> (ask an ephemeral side question about the current session without changing future session context; see /tools/btw)
  • /export-session [path] (alias: /export) (export current session to HTML with full system prompt)
  • /whoami (show your sender id; alias: /id)
  • /session idle <duration|off> (manage inactivity auto-unfocus for focused thread bindings)
  • /session max-age <duration|off> (manage hard max-age auto-unfocus for focused thread bindings)
  • /subagents list|kill|log|info|send|steer|spawn (inspect, control, or spawn sub-agent runs for the current session)
  • /acp spawn|cancel|steer|close|status|set-mode|set|cwd|permissions|timeout|model|reset-options|doctor|install|sessions (inspect and control ACP runtime sessions)
  • /agents (list thread-bound agents for this session)
  • /focus <target> (Discord: bind this thread, or a new thread, to a session/subagent target)
  • /unfocus (Discord: remove the current thread binding)
  • /kill <id|#|all> (immediately abort one or all running sub-agents for this session; no confirmation message)
  • /steer <id|#> <message> (steer a running sub-agent immediately: in-run when possible, otherwise abort current work and restart on the steer message)
  • /tell <id|#> <message> (alias for /steer)
  • /config show|get|set|unset (persist config to disk, owner-only; requires commands.config: true)
  • /mcp show|get|set|unset (manage OpenClaw MCP server config, owner-only; requires commands.mcp: true)
  • /plugins list|show|get|install|enable|disable (inspect discovered plugins, install new ones, and toggle enablement; owner-only for writes; requires commands.plugins: true)
  • /plugin is an alias for /plugins.
  • /plugin install <spec> accepts the same plugin specs as openclaw plugins install: local path/archive, npm package, or clawhub:<pkg>.
  • Enable/disable writes still reply with a restart hint. On a watched foreground gateway, OpenClaw may perform that restart automatically right after the write.
  • /debug show|set|unset|reset (runtime overrides, owner-only; requires commands.debug: true)
  • /usage off|tokens|full|cost (per-response usage footer or local cost summary)
  • /tts off|always|inbound|tagged|status|provider|limit|summary|audio (control TTS; see /tts)
  • Discord: native command is /voice (Discord reserves /tts); text /tts still works.
  • /stop
  • /restart
  • /dock-telegram (alias: /dock_telegram) (switch replies to Telegram)
  • /dock-discord (alias: /dock_discord) (switch replies to Discord)
  • /dock-slack (alias: /dock_slack) (switch replies to Slack)
  • /activation mention|always (groups only)
  • /send on|off|inherit (owner-only)
  • /reset or /new [model] (optional model hint; remainder is passed through)
  • /think <off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh> (dynamic choices by model/provider; aliases: /thinking, /t)
  • /fast status|on|off (omitting the arg shows the current effective fast-mode state)
  • /verbose on|full|off (alias: /v)
  • /reasoning on|off|stream (alias: /reason; when on, sends a separate message prefixed Reasoning:; stream = Telegram draft only)
  • /elevated on|off|ask|full (alias: /elev; full skips exec approvals)
  • /exec host=<sandbox|gateway|node> security=<deny|allowlist|full> ask=<off|on-miss|always> node=<id> (send /exec to show current)
  • /model <name> (alias: /models; or /<alias> from agents.defaults.models.*.alias)
  • /queue <mode> (plus options like debounce:2s cap:25 drop:summarize; send /queue to see current settings)
  • /bash <command> (host-only; alias for ! <command>; requires commands.bash: true + tools.elevated allowlists)
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Text-only:”。

原文小纸条

Text-only:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Command list”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/compact [instructions] (see /concepts/co…、! <魔法口令> (host-only; one at a time; use !…、!poll (check output / status; accepts opt…、!stop (stop the running bash job; accepts…。

原文小纸条
  • /compact [instructions] (see /concepts/compaction)
  • ! <command> (host-only; one at a time; use !poll + !stop for long-running jobs)
  • !poll (check output / status; accepts optional sessionId; /bash poll also works)
  • !stop (stop the running bash job; accepts optional sessionId; /bash stop also works)
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Command list”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：魔法口令s accept an optional : between the 魔法…、/new <聪明脑袋模型> accepts a 聪明脑袋模型 alias, pro…、For full provider usage breakdown, use op…、/allowlist add remove requires 魔法口令s.设置说明…。

原文小纸条
  • Commands accept an optional : between the command and args (e.g. /think: high, /send: on, /help:).
  • /new <model> accepts a model alias, provider/model, or a provider name (fuzzy match); if no match, the text is treated as the message body.
  • For full provider usage breakdown, use openclaw status --usage.
  • /allowlist add|remove requires commands.config=true and honors channel configWrites.
  • In multi-account channels, config-targeted /allowlist --account <id> and /config set channels.<provider>.accounts.<id>... also honor the target account's configWrites.
  • /usage controls the per-response usage footer; /usage cost prints a local cost summary from OpenClaw session logs.
  • /restart is enabled by default; set commands.restart: false to disable it.
  • Discord-only native command: /vc join|leave|status controls voice channels (requires channels.discord.voice and native commands; not available as text).
  • Discord thread-binding commands (/focus, /unfocus, /agents, /session idle, /session max-age) require effective thread bindings to be enabled (session.threadBindings.enabled and/or channels.discord.threadBindings.enabled).
  • ACP command reference and runtime behavior: ACP Agents.
  • /verbose is meant for debugging and extra visibility; keep it **off** in normal use.
  • /fast on|off persists a session override. Use the Sessions UI inherit option to clear it and fall back to config defaults.
  • Tool failure summaries are still shown when relevant, but detailed failure text is only included when /verbose is on or full.
  • /reasoning (and /verbose) are risky in group settings: they may reveal internal reasoning or tool output you did not intend to expose. Prefer leaving them off, especially in group chats.
  • **Fast path:** command-only messages from allowlisted senders are handled immediately (bypass queue + model).
  • **Group mention gating:** command-only messages from allowlisted senders bypass mention requirements.
  • **Inline shortcuts (allowlisted senders only):** certain commands also work when embedded in a normal message and are stripped before the model sees the remaining text.
  • Example: hey /status triggers a status reply, and the remaining text continues through the normal flow.
  • Currently: /help, /commands, /status, /whoami (/id).
  • Unauthorized command-only messages are silently ignored, and inline /... tokens are treated as plain text.
  • **Skill commands:** user-invocable skills are exposed as slash commands. Names are sanitized to a-z0-9_ (max 32 chars); collisions get numeric suffixes (e.g. _2).
  • /skill <name> [input] runs a skill by name (useful when native command limits prevent per-skill commands).
  • By default, skill commands are forwarded to the model as a normal request.
  • Skills may optionally declare command-dispatch: tool to route the command directly to a tool (deterministic, no model).
  • Example: /prose (OpenProse plugin) — see OpenProse.
  • **Native command arguments:** Discord uses autocomplete for dynamic options (and button menus when you omit required args). Telegram and Slack show a button menu when a command supports choices and you omit the arg.

第 4 站

`/工具小帮手s`

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/工具小帮手s”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/工具小帮手s answers a runtime question, not a 设置说明书 question: **what this 机器人朋友 can use right now in this conversation**.”。

原文小纸条

/tools answers a runtime question, not a config question: **what this agent can use right now in this conversation**.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“change the output.”。

原文小纸条

change the output.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“新本领插件 工具小帮手s, and 消息通道-owned 工具小帮手s.”。

原文小纸条

plugin tools, and channel-owned tools.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“`/tools`”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Default /工具小帮手s is compact and optimized…、/工具小帮手s verbose adds short descriptions.、Native-魔法口令 surfaces that support argumen…、Results are session-scoped, so changing 机…。

原文小纸条
  • Default /tools is compact and optimized for quick scanning.
  • /tools verbose adds short descriptions.
  • Native-command surfaces that support arguments expose the same mode switch as compact|verbose.
  • Results are session-scoped, so changing agent, channel, thread, sender authorization, or model can
  • /tools includes tools that are actually reachable at runtime, including core tools, connected
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“For profile and override editing, use the Control UI 工具小帮手s panel or 设置说明书/catalog surfaces instead of treating /工具小帮手s…”。

原文小纸条

For profile and override editing, use the Control UI Tools panel or config/catalog surfaces instead of treating /tools as a static catalog.

第 5 站

Usage surfaces (what shows where)

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Usage surfaces (what shows where)”。

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Usage surfaces (what shows where)”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：**Provider usage/quota** (example: “Claud…、**Per-response tokens/cost** is controlle…、/聪明脑袋模型 status is about **聪明脑袋模型s/auth/en…。

原文小纸条
  • **Provider usage/quota** (example: “Claude 80% left”) shows up in /status for the current model provider when usage tracking is enabled.
  • **Per-response tokens/cost** is controlled by /usage off|tokens|full (appended to normal replies).
  • /model status is about **models/auth/endpoints**, not usage.

第 6 站

聪明脑袋模型 selection (`/聪明脑袋模型`)

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“聪明脑袋模型 selection (/聪明脑袋模型)”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/聪明脑袋模型 is implemented as a directive.”。

原文小纸条

/model is implemented as a directive.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Examples:”。

原文小纸条

Examples:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/model”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/model list”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/model 3”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
/model
/model list
/model 3
/model openai/gpt-5.2
/model opus@anthropic:default
/model status
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Model selection (`/model`)”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/聪明脑袋模型 and /聪明脑袋模型 list show a compact,…、On Discord, /聪明脑袋模型 and /聪明脑袋模型s open an…、/聪明脑袋模型 <#> selects from that picker (and…、/聪明脑袋模型 status shows the detailed view, i…。

原文小纸条
  • /model and /model list show a compact, numbered picker (model family + available providers).
  • On Discord, /model and /models open an interactive picker with provider and model dropdowns plus a Submit step.
  • /model <#> selects from that picker (and prefers the current provider when possible).
  • /model status shows the detailed view, including configured provider endpoint (baseUrl) and API mode (api) when available.

第 7 站

Debug overrides

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Debug overrides”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/debug lets you set **runtime-only** 设置说明书 overrides (memory, not disk). Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with 魔…”。

原文小纸条

/debug lets you set **runtime-only** config overrides (memory, not disk). Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with commands.debug: true.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Examples:”。

原文小纸条

Examples:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/debug show”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/debug set messages.responsePrefix="[openclaw]"”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/debug set channels.whatsapp.allowFrom=["+1555","+4477"]”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
/debug show
/debug set messages.responsePrefix="[openclaw]"
/debug set channels.whatsapp.allowFrom=["+1555","+4477"]
/debug unset messages.responsePrefix
/debug reset
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Debug overrides”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Overrides apply immediately to new 设置说明书…、Use /debug reset to clear all overrides a…。

原文小纸条
  • Overrides apply immediately to new config reads, but do **not** write to openclaw.json.
  • Use /debug reset to clear all overrides and return to the on-disk config.

第 8 站

设置说明书 updates

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“设置说明书 updates”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/设置说明书 writes to your on-disk 设置说明书 (openclaw.json). Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with 魔法口令s.设置说明书: true.”。

原文小纸条

/config writes to your on-disk config (openclaw.json). Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with commands.config: true.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Examples:”。

原文小纸条

Examples:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/config show”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/config show messages.responsePrefix”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/config get messages.responsePrefix”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
/config show
/config show messages.responsePrefix
/config get messages.responsePrefix
/config set messages.responsePrefix="[openclaw]"
/config unset messages.responsePrefix
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Config updates”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：设置说明书 is validated before write; invalid…、/设置说明书 updates persist across restarts.

原文小纸条
  • Config is validated before write; invalid changes are rejected.
  • /config updates persist across restarts.

第 9 站

MCP updates

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“MCP updates”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/mcp writes OpenClaw-managed MCP 大房子服务器 definitions under mcp.大房子服务器s. Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with 魔法口…”。

原文小纸条

/mcp writes OpenClaw-managed MCP server definitions under mcp.servers. Owner-only. Disabled by default; enable with commands.mcp: true.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Examples:”。

原文小纸条

Examples:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/mcp show”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/mcp show context7”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这里在给“/mcp set context7={command”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“uvxargs:[context7-mcp]}”。
原文代码块
/mcp show
/mcp show context7
/mcp set context7={"command":"uvx","args":["context7-mcp"]}
/mcp unset context7
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“MCP updates”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/mcp stores 设置说明书 in OpenClaw 设置说明书, not…、Runtime adapters decide which transports…。

原文小纸条
  • /mcp stores config in OpenClaw config, not Pi-owned project settings.
  • Runtime adapters decide which transports are actually executable.

第 10 站

新本领插件 updates

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“新本领插件 updates”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/新本领插件s lets operators inspect discovered 新本领插件s and toggle enablement in 设置说明书. Read-only flows can use /新本领插件 as an a…”。

原文小纸条

/plugins lets operators inspect discovered plugins and toggle enablement in config. Read-only flows can use /plugin as an alias. Disabled by default; enable with commands.plugins: true.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Examples:”。

原文小纸条

Examples:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/plugins”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/plugins list”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
  • 这一行“/plugin show context7”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
/plugins
/plugins list
/plugin show context7
/plugins enable context7
/plugins disable context7
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Plugin updates”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/新本领插件s list and /新本领插件s show use real 新本…、/新本领插件s enable disable updates 新本领插件 设置说明…、After enable/disable changes, restart the…。

原文小纸条
  • /plugins list and /plugins show use real plugin discovery against the current workspace plus on-disk config.
  • /plugins enable|disable updates plugin config only; it does not install or uninstall plugins.
  • After enable/disable changes, restart the gateway to apply them.

第 11 站

Surface notes

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Surface notes”。

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Surface notes”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：**Text 魔法口令s** run in the normal chat ses…、**Native 魔法口令s** use isolated sessions:、Discord: 机器人朋友:<机器人朋友Id>:discord:slash:<u…、Slack: 机器人朋友:<机器人朋友Id>:slack:slash:<userI…。

原文小纸条
  • **Text commands** run in the normal chat session (DMs share main, groups have their own session).
  • **Native commands** use isolated sessions:
  • Discord: agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>
  • Slack: agent:<agentId>:slack:slash:<userId> (prefix configurable via channels.slack.slashCommand.sessionPrefix)
  • Telegram: telegram:slash:<userId> (targets the chat session via CommandTargetSessionKey)
  • **/stop** targets the active chat session so it can abort the current run.
  • **Slack:** channels.slack.slashCommand is still supported for a single /openclaw-style command. If you enable commands.native, you must create one Slack slash command per built-in command (same names as /help). Command argument menus for Slack are delivered as ephemeral Block Kit buttons.
  • Slack native exception: register /agentstatus (not /status) because Slack reserves /status. Text /status still works in Slack messages.

第 12 站

BTW side questions

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“BTW side questions”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“/btw is a quick **side question** about the current session.”。

原文小纸条

/btw is a quick **side question** about the current session.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Unlike normal chat:”。

原文小纸条

Unlike normal chat:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“BTW side questions”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：it uses the current session as background…、it runs as a separate **工具小帮手-less** one-…、it does not change future session context,、it is not written to transcript history,。

原文小纸条
  • it uses the current session as background context,
  • it runs as a separate **tool-less** one-shot call,
  • it does not change future session context,
  • it is not written to transcript history,
  • it is delivered as a live side result instead of a normal assistant message.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“That makes /btw useful when you want a temporary clarification while the main task keeps going.”。

原文小纸条

That makes /btw useful when you want a temporary clarification while the main task keeps going.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Example:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像给机器人看的说明书，告诉它要按什么样子准备东西。

  • 这一行“/btw what are we doing right now?”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
/btw what are we doing right now?
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“See BTW Side Questions for the full behavior and 来帮忙的小伙伴 UX details.”。

原文小纸条

See BTW Side Questions for the full behavior and client UX details.

这里预留给未来的 Google AdSense 模块。

Fivey Can Read OpenClaw
